nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, “Behold, evil is going forth From nation to nation, And a great storm is being stirred up From the remotest parts of the earth.

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts: Behold, disaster is going forth from nation to nation, and a great tempest is stirring from the farthest parts of the earth!

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “看哪！必有災禍發出， 從這國直到那國； 必有大風暴從地極颳起。”

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华说： “看啊，灾难正蔓延到列国， 有暴风从地极卷起。”
